name: apkrunner
description: APKRunner monorepo: Electron shell plus Rust APK inspection/runtime foundation.

scripts.build: npm run build:rust && npm run build:desktop
scripts.check: npm run test:ts && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:ts
scripts.test:ts: npm --workspace @apkrunner/desktop run typecheck && npm --workspace @apkrunner/desktop run test:imports
